_comment: Ordered queue of NEW DeepRead skills to publish to ClawHub, one per day. The daily workflow publishes the FIRST entry whose slug is not yet on the registry, then stops. Already-published slugs are skipped (no duplicates). Add new entries to the bottom to keep the campaign going. Each must be genuinely useful, standalone content — never filler.

skills.name: DeepRead Bank Statements
skills.changelog: Extract account holder, period, balances, and every transaction from bank statements as typed JSON. Built-in reconciliation check, per-field confidence flags, PII redaction for compliant sharing.

skills.name: DeepRead Resume Parser
skills.changelog: Parse resumes/CVs into structured JSON — contact, work history, education, skills, years of experience. Handles any layout. Per-field confidence flags. PII redaction for bias-free screening.

skills.name: DeepRead Tax Forms
skills.changelog: Extract W-2s, 1099s, and 1040s into typed JSON — employer/payer, recipient, wages, withholdings, box-by-box amounts. Per-field confidence flags. PII redaction built in.

skills.name: DeepRead Purchase Orders
skills.changelog: Extract PO number, buyer/supplier, line items, quantities, prices, delivery dates, and totals as typed JSON. Includes 2-way PO/invoice matching. Per-field confidence flags.

skills.name: DeepRead Pay Stubs
skills.changelog: Extract employer, employee, pay period, gross/net pay, deductions, and YTD totals from pay stubs. Income-verification ready with annualization helper. PII redaction built in.

skills.name: DeepRead Shipping Documents
skills.changelog: Extract shipper, consignee, carrier, BOL/tracking, containers, and itemized contents with weights from bills of lading and packing lists. Per-field confidence flags.

skills.name: DeepRead ID Documents
skills.changelog: Extract name, document number, dates, and nationality from passports, licenses, and national IDs for KYC/onboarding. Expiry checks, per-field confidence flags, PII redaction for compliant storage.
